mobile.line1: Send tasks, links, and screenshots from your phone.
mobile.line2: Keep lightweight review and triage flows in sync.
mobile.line3: Hand off mobile-captured context to desktop agents.

empty.slackActivitySubtitle: Mentions and unread DMs will appear here.

connectForge.kindDisabledDescription: Turn {{lower}} back on in Contexts settings.

featurebase.title: Connect Featurebase
featurebase.description: Paste your Featurebase API key and your public feedback URL. Stored locally in your macOS Keychain.

forgejo.title: Connect Forgejo
forgejo.description: Paste your Forgejo instance URL and an access token. Stored locally in your macOS Keychain.

jira.title: Connect Jira
jira.description: Enter your site URL, email, and API token. Stored locally in your macOS Keychain.

linear.title: Connect Linear
linear.description: Paste a personal API key. It's validated once and stored locally in your macOS Keychain.

trello.title: Connect Trello
trello.description: Paste your Trello API key and token. Stored locally in your macOS Keychain.

plain.title: Connect Plain
plain.description: Paste a Plain API key with the thread:read permission. Stored locally in your macOS Keychain.
plain.help: Where do I create an API key?

slack.title: Connect a Slack workspace
slack.description: Connects to your signed-in Slack desktop app. Everything stays local and secure on your device.
slack.descriptionUnsupported: Slack desktop import is available on macOS. Windows support is not wired up yet.
slack.nothingMessage: No signed-in Slack workspaces were found in your desktop app.

linear.emptySubtitle: Issues assigned to you in Linear will appear here.

jira.emptySubtitle: Issues assigned to you in Jira will appear here.

trello.emptySubtitle: Cards you're a member of in Trello will appear here.

forgejo.emptySubtitle: Issues assigned to you in Forgejo will appear here.

featurebase.emptySubtitle: Feedback posts from your Featurebase board will appear here.

plain.emptySubtitle: Open support threads from Plain will appear here.

settings.connectAccountDescription: You need at least one {{provider}} account before Contexts can pull {{kinds}}.
settings.repositoryDescription: Choose the repo these Contexts settings apply to.
settings.issuesDescription: Surface {{plural}} you're assigned to or have opened.
settings.prsDescription: Surface {{plural}} you opened or are assigned to.
settings.discussionsDescription: Surface {{plural}} in repos you have access to.
settings.scopeDescription: Which {{singular}} relationship {{provider}} should use by default.
settings.sortDescription: Default ordering before any sidebar filters are applied.
settings.labelsDescription: Only include {{plural}} with selected repository labels.
settings.draftsDescription: Whether draft {{plural}} appear in the feed.
settings.addRepoFirst: Add or connect a {{provider}} repository before configuring Contexts.
settings.slackConnected: Slack is connected. Open the Context sidebar to browse your feed.
settings.slackConnectedCount: {{count}} Slack workspaces connected. Open the Context sidebar to browse your feed.

triage.customInstructionsHint: Tell the triage agent what to focus on, in plain language.
triage.customInstructionsPlaceholder:
e.g.
• Watch Slack #incidents and DMs from my team lead
• Surface every Slack message that @-mentions me
• Skip bot notifications and weekly digests
triage.sourcesHint: Where Grex pulls triage candidates from. Incremental fetch every 5 minutes.
triage.autoRunOnDescription: — a tick fires right after each fetch (every 5 minutes). Overlapping ticks are skipped.
triage.autoRunOffDescription: — ticks only run when you press Run now.
triage.smartTriageDescription: The local LLM scans your enabled sources and creates AI-prepared workspaces for actionable items.
